```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(countrycode)
library(rmapshaper)
cpi_raw <- read_csv("consumer-price-index.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
df_inf <- cpi_raw %>%
  rename(
    Country = Entity,
    CPI     = `Consumer price index (2010 = 100)`
  ) %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  arrange(Year) %>%
  mutate(
    Inflation = (CPI / lag(CPI) - 1) * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(Inflation))
df_food <- read_csv("share-of-consumer-expenditure-spent-on-food.csv",
                    show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename(
    Country   = Entity,
    FoodShare = `Food as share of total consumer expenditure`
  ) %>%
  select(Country, Year, FoodShare)
df <- inner_join(df_inf, df_food, by = c("Country", "Year")) %>%
  mutate(
    iso3 = countrycode(Country, "country.name", "iso3c")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(iso3))
world_sf <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  select(iso_a3, name, geometry) %>%
  ms_simplify(keep = 0.05, keep_shapes = TRUE)
saveRDS(df, "data_prepped.rds")
message("data_prepped.rds written")
saveRDS(world_sf, "world_simp.rds")
message("world_simp.rds written")
```
